title: olearia crenifingens
intro: Olearia crenifingens, also known as the mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. The leaves and flowers of the Olearia crenifingens plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia crenifingens include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Olearia crenifingens include teas and tinctures, which can be used to make infusions or topical applications for various health issues.
